meaning: adv.可享乐地,愉快地,有趣地
examples: These tips can help you safely - and enjoyably - exercise when the weather turns chilly.
The better you understand this, the more easily and enjoyably you'll achieve your goals.
Her narrative, though sometimes tangential and disjointed, rattles enjoyably through a lurid and restless landscape.
Pav (pronounced, enjoyably, "pow"), the small, square, hamburger-bun-like roll in which the fritter is sandwiched wouldn't pose any problems either.
